description:
GeForce NOW connects to digital PC game stores so you can stream the library of games you already own

GeForce NOW instantly transforms nearly any laptop, desktop, Mac, SHIELD TV, Android device, iPhone, or iPad into the PC gaming rig you’ve always dreamed of.
Play the most demanding PC games and seamlessly play across your devices.
New Subscription Labels for Game Libraries
- Easily find games included with your Ubisoft+ and Xbox Game Pass memberships. New in-app labels highlight supported titles so you can quickly discover and stream games you already have access to from your connected subscription services. The streamlined flow lets you quickly mark games as owned and start streaming right away.
Expanded Racing Wheel Support
- More peripherals are now supported on GeForce NOW. Newly supported devices include: Logitech RS50 XBOX, Logitech RS50 PS, Thrustmaster T98 XBOX, and Thrustmaster T98 PS.
Whatcha Thinking?
- Tell us about your streaming session, or what games you want to play, or suggest improvements we can make. Use that exclamation icon to send feedback in the app and let us know what you think.
